name: Hershey's Best Brownies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hershey's cocoa or European style cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt the butter by microwaving on HIGH for 2 to 2-1/2 minutes.
4. Stir in sugar and vanilla extract.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix in cocoa powder until well blended.
7. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; stir until just mixed.
8. Fold in chopped nuts if desired.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until the brownies pull away from the sides of the pan.
11. Allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
12. Cut into bars. Yield: about 36 brownies.
